Sarah Mitchell

Founder & Principal Broker

4.9(142 reviews)

Sarah founded UrbanNest in 2013 after 8 years at a national brokerage. She specializes in luxury residential and investment properties across West Austin and Westlake. Her deep market knowledge and negotiation skills have helped clients save and earn millions.

James Okafor

Senior Buyer's Agent

4.9(98 reviews)

James has helped over 200 families find their perfect home in Austin. His deep knowledge of East Austin and the Domain area makes him a go-to for first-time buyers. He's known for his patience, honesty, and ability to find off-market deals.

Priya Nair

Listing Specialist

5(87 reviews)

Priya's marketing expertise and staging knowledge consistently achieve above-asking prices for her sellers. She covers South Austin, Buda, and Kyle. Her listings average 98.4% of list price and sell in under 30 days.

Carlos Reyes

Commercial & Investment Advisor

4.8(64 reviews)

Carlos brings 12 years of commercial real estate experience to UrbanNest. He advises investors on multi-family, retail, and mixed-use opportunities across the Austin metro. His financial modeling and market analysis are second to none.

Relocation Specialist

Our Culture

A team that works together

Every week our agents share market intelligence, off-market leads, and client feedback. That collaboration is what gives UrbanNest clients an edge — you get one agent's attention with the knowledge of the whole team behind them.

Careers

Join the UrbanNest team

We're always looking for talented, motivated agents who share our commitment to client service and Austin community.

Top Commission Structure

Competitive splits with performance bonuses for top producers.

Mentorship Program

New agents are paired with senior agents for 6 months of guided development.

Marketing Support

Professional photography, social media, and listing marketing included.

Leads & Technology

Access to our CRM, lead pipeline, and proprietary market data tools.

Apply to Join Our Team

Ready to work with an expert?

Match with the right agent for your needs — buyer, seller, investor, or relocator.

Find My Agent
